mapper.select: select version , dn_url_adr as updateUrl , title || ':' || up_sbst as updateMsg from msf_app_version mav where 1=1 and os_cd = #{os} and use_yn = 'Y' order by app_version_seq desc limit 1
select user_id , mac_adr , os_cd , version , app_os_ver , app_nm , last_access_dt , auto_login_yn , bio_login_yn , apv_sttus_cd from msf_usr_app_info where 1=1 and uuid = #{uuid}
mapper.delete: delete from msf_usr_app_info where 1=1 and uuid = #{uuid}
update msf_usr_app_info set apv_sttus_cd = 'C' where 1=1 and uuid = #{uuid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO msf_usr_app_info (uuid, mac_adr, user_id, os_cd, "version", app_os_ver, app_nm, last_access_dt, auto_login_yn, bio_login_yn, apv_sttus_cd) VALUES (#{uuid}, #{madAdr}, #{userId}, #{osCd}, #{version}, #{appOsVer}, #{appNm}, now(), #{autoLoginYn}, #{bioLoginYn}, 'A')
